news.paragraph: Silver traders are navigating a conflict between macroeconomic headwinds, such as rising Treasury yields, and strong sector-specific tailwinds. While broader equity markets have experienced recent volatility, long-term industrial demand from clean energy and record-setting commodity trends suggest a positive underlying outlook. Options traders should weigh these macro pressures against the long-term growth drivers for the metal.

headlines.title: Treasury Yields Jump Amid Fed Shift. Blame These Culprits As S&P 500 Falls.
